title: OT-2 PCR Prep: Master Mix Distribution and DNA Transfer
author: Opentrons (verified)

steps.title: Part 2 of 2
steps.instruction: Part 2 of 2: Master Mix Distribution and DNA Transfer Links: * [Part 1: Master Mix Assembly](./pcr_prep_part_1) * [Part 2: Master Mix Distribution and DNA Transfer](./pcr_prep_part_2) This protocol allows your robot to distribute a master mix solution from well A1 of a trough to PCR strips. Robot will then transfer DNA samples to the master mix solution. --- You will need: * [12-channel reservoir](https://www.usascientific.com/12-channel-automation-reservoir.aspx) * [96-well PCR plate](https://www.bio-rad.com/en-us/sku/hsp9601-hard-shell-96-well-pcr-plates-low-profile-thin-wall-skirted-white-clear?ID=hsp9601)

steps.title: Input the number of samples you are processing
steps.instruction: Input the number of samples you are processing.

steps.title: Input the desired master mix and...
steps.instruction: Input the desired master mix and DNA volume in each well.

steps.title: Upload your protocol into the OT App
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol into the OT App.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support article.

steps.title: Robot will distribute master mix solution...
steps.instruction: Robot will distribute master mix solution from trough to PCR strips in slot 2.

steps.title: Robot will transfer DNA from PCR...
steps.instruction: Robot will transfer DNA from PCR strips in slot 1 to those in slot 2.
